title: The Country Turns Toward Rebellion
description: Pages 16–17 focus on the country turns toward rebellion, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as after Sugar's defeat, the restored fighters and citizens flood Dressrosa with confusion while Usopp becomes the unlikely hero who broke the country's hidden curse.
